race.description: Find Your Stakes Winner @ The Chase Hcp (Bm72)
race.comment: SEQUISTA (5) never a hope last Saturday with the way the track was racing when going back from the outside gate. Caught the eye late on that occasion to run fifth over 1400m at this track. Braith Nock sticks and can return to winning form in this easier contest. GORGEOUS (9) has found the 1100m too short in all four runs this prep and gives every indication of running a solid 1300m. Had no luck in the straight when sixth here last Saturday. Can race a touch closer today and figure prominently. HELLO CAPTAIN (4) improving gelding who should have finished much closer when held up in the straight before getting out late to run fourth over 1300m at Randwick. Gets a bit more galloping room here with the claim. Go close. ATTRACTIVENESS (8) expected to go on with it this prep after she demolished inferior opposition over 1250m at Newcastle in C1 class. Latham sticks and goes equally as well second-up. CROSSBOW (3) comes back a level today and look for him to swoop late.
